name: tab-chord-formatter
description: Format a messy guitar tab or chord sheet into a clean, standard, readable layout. Paste a tab copied from anywhere — a web page, an email, a forum — and get back a normalized chord sheet: standardized [Section] labels, chords aligned over the right lyric syllables, a tidy metadata header (Title/Artist/Capo/Key/Tuning), and well-formed 6-line ASCII tab blocks. A bundled script does the deterministic cleanup (HTML/entity decode, whitespace, section labels); the skill applies judgment to re-align chords and infer structure.
